title: quickstart.md E2E sweep against 3-peer fixture
summary: Every documented pgmctl command runs against the live rig and returns a meaningful exit code per FR-037. The 3 fixture-aware passes (exit 2 / 3) correctly reflect node-b being in failed state.

resolved_in_phase9.issue: get audit / list / describe didn't accept the history-stream filter flags (--since/--until/--type/--node/--limit/--cursor/--list-types) though quickstart used them
resolved_in_phase9.fix: Plumbed eventsFlags into newGetCmd / newListCmd / newDescribeCmd; runGet's events/audit branch now honours operator-supplied filters with 30m/1000 fallback when omitted

resolved_in_phase9.issue: First-pass verifier checked dump --output - for gzip magic; --output - emits raw tar by design
resolved_in_phase9.fix: Verifier updated to grep for the slices/ tar entry prefix instead
